Her hull, made from durable GRP, displays a classic deep blue colour, and a recently renewed teak deck (2020) offers safe and comfortable footing. Wide side decks, wheel steering, and a practical cutter rig make her easy to handle, whether you’re sailing short-handed or with a full crew.With a length overall of 17.68 metres and beam of 5.05 metres, she offers generous living space below and above deck. The yacht is laid out with four cabins, accommodating up to ten persons, making her a favourable option for families, groups of friends, or entertaining guests. The interior is finished with teak and mahogany, providing a warm ambience throughout the saloon and cabins. The galley is well-equipped for longer passages, with a gas stove, oven, fridge and freezer, and plenty of storage.Powered by twin Perkins Prima M60 inboard engines, each producing 60 HP, the Dynamique 58 for sale 1991 provides smooth, reliable motoring. With just 3,000 engine hours, the engines have been maintained with care. For further convenience, she is fitted with bow thruster, bilge pumps, and a powerful 7kW generator. Solar panels and an inverter enhance energy independence for long stays at anchor.For navigation, she features a comprehensive suite of equipment, including GPS, chartplotter, radar, autopilot, VHF radio, and depth/wind/speed instruments. Davits, a dinghy, and a swim ladder make accessing the water or shore straightforward. Safety is further ensured with a life raft, fire extinguisher, and fitted bathing platform.The three heads are each fitted with showers, and the warm water system ensures comfort throughout all cabins. descriptionHtml:
Dynamique 58 for sale 1991 | 4 Cabins + 3 heads | Tax Paid | Excellent Condition

If you’re searching for a well-built, spacious, and reliable bluewater cruiser, the Dynamique 58 for sale 1991 is worth considering. Crafted by Dufour Yachts and designed by Joubert & Nivelt, this classic 58-foot sailboat has earned an excellent reputation for her balance of comfort and performance on long voyages.

This particular Dynamique 58 for sale 1991 is presented in excellent condition. Her hull, made from durable GRP, displays a classic deep blue colour, and a recently renewed teak deck (2020) offers safe and comfortable footing. Wide side decks, wheel steering, and a practical cutter rig make her easy to handle, whether you’re sailing short-handed or with a full crew.

With a length overall of 17.68 metres and beam of 5.05 metres, she offers generous living space below and above deck. The yacht is laid out with four cabins, accommodating up to ten persons, making her a favourable option for families, groups of friends, or entertaining guests. The interior is finished with teak and mahogany, providing a warm ambience throughout the saloon and cabins. The galley is well-equipped for longer passages, with a gas stove, oven, fridge and freezer, and plenty of storage.

Powered by twin Perkins Prima M60 inboard engines, each producing 60 HP, the Dynamique 58 for sale 1991 provides smooth, reliable motoring. With just 3,000 engine hours, the engines have been maintained with care. For further convenience, she is fitted with bow thruster, bilge pumps, and a powerful 7kW generator. Solar panels and an inverter enhance energy independence for long stays at anchor.

For navigation, she features a comprehensive suite of equipment, including GPS, chartplotter, radar, autopilot, VHF radio, and depth/wind/speed instruments. Davits, a dinghy, and a swim ladder make accessing the water or shore straightforward. Safety is further ensured with a life raft, fire extinguisher, and fitted bathing platform.

The three heads are each fitted with showers, and the warm water system ensures comfort throughout all cabins. Enjoy evenings with a built-in radio, CD player, MP3 player, and cockpit speakers, while the spacious cockpit features a teak table, bimini, sprayhood, and cockpit cover for all-weather protection.

Specifications – Dynamique 58 for sale 1991

  • Builder: Dufour Yachts
  • Designer: Joubert & Nivelt
  • Year Built: 1991
  • Overall Length: 17.68 m (58 ft)
  • Beam: 5.05 m (16.6 ft)
  • Draft: 2.20 m (7.2 ft)
  • Material: GRP Hull (Blue)
  • Deck: Teak (renewed 2020)
  • Engine: 2 x Perkins Prima M60 (60 HP each)
  • Engine Hours: 3,000 h
  • Fuel: Diesel, 1,200 L
  • Water Capacity: 1,500 L
  • Holding Tank: 120 L
  • Cabins: 4
  • Berths: 5 beds
  • Toilets: 3 (with showers)
  • Max. Persons: Certified for 10
  • Propulsion: Inboard direct-drive
  • Sails: Mast furling mainsail, roller furling jib and genoa
  • Winches: 7 manual, 3 electric
  • Generator: 7kW
  • Solar Panels: Fitted
  • Bow Thruster: Yes
  • Navigation: GPS, radar, chartplotter, autopilot, VHF radio, wind/depth/speed instruments
  • Safety: Life raft, fire extinguisher
  • Additional Equipment: Gas stove, oven, fridge, freezer, anchor, windlass, bathing platform, swim ladder, cockpit speakers, bimini, sprayhood, davits

For anyone seeking a dependable, well-maintained sailing yacht, the Dynamique 58 for sale 1991 is ready to deliver memorable experiences at sea. To arrange a viewing or get further information, please get in touch.
